_comment: License provenance for every preview sample. PrintShelf is the license-clearance company — every sample MUST be CC0 or PrintShelf-original. Procedural samples are authored in filament-viewer.js (geometry generated in code) and are therefore PrintShelf-original. The 3DBenchy STL is CC0 (released 2025); drop the file at its path to enable it.

samples.name: 3DBenchy
samples.origin: Created by NTI / Creative Tools; released into the public domain (CC0) in 2025
samples.note: Drop the CC0 STL at this path to enable. The viewer lists it only when the file is present (HEAD check), so absence degrades gracefully.
